description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of a designated plant related model at a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_plmod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_plmod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Plant bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a plant-related model.
no <model type> model at this machine.
the <model type> model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no VARs used in model NAME.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
